rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Text containing God’s promises to Israel (fol. 123rv, a loose leaf)
Text concerning the Nativity of John the Baptist
Homily by John Chrysostom on penance
Homily by Jacob of Serug on the Apostle Thomas
Homily by John Chrysostom on Lazarus
Homily by John Chrysostom on the Samaritan woman
Homily by John Theologus (Tewologos) on Easter Sunday
Text concerning Archangel Michael, the Vision of Daniel and the Three Holy Children
